name: Abzu Gold Ltd.
summary: Abzu Gold Ltd. engages the exploration and development of gold projects. It holds a portfolio of 16 prospective concessions in Bole-Nangodi, Kibi, Sefwi, Asankrangwa, and Ashanti belts of Ghana. The company was formerly known as Totem Minerals Inc. and changed its name to Abzu Gold Ltd. as a result of its acquisition of Abzu Resources Ltd. in December 2010. Abzu Gold Ltd. is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
